name: Snicker Cake
recipeIngredient: German chocolate cake mix (or 1 recipe of German chocolate cake)
recipeInstructions:
Prepare the cake mix as directed. Remove half of the cake mixture and place it in a greased and floured 13x9x2 inch pan. Bake at 350°F for approximately 25 minutes or until the cake springs back when touched. Remove from oven and set to 250°F.
Melt caramels with margarine and milk in a saucepan, stirring until caramel is melted. Pour over baked portion of cake. Spread chopped nuts and chocolate chips evenly over top, then pour remaining cake mixture on top. Bake at 250°F for 20 minutes, then increase to 350°F and bake an additional 10 minutes or until set. Let cool overnight before serving from the pan.
